glosses.vi: khoa cấp cứu; phòng cấp cứu
glosses.id: unit gawat darurat; instalasi gawat darurat
glosses.ro: camera de gardă; secția de urgențe
glosses.ja: 救急外来; 救急受付

translations.en: I'm driving to the emergency room.
translations.fr: Je vais aux urgences en voiture.
translations.it: Sto andando al pronto soccorso in macchina.
translations.ru: Я еду в отделение неотложной помощи.
translations.pt: Estou indo de carro para o pronto-socorro.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lái xe đến phòng cấp cứu.
translations.ar: أنا أقود السيارة إلى قسم الطوارئ.
translations.nl: Ik rijd naar de spoedeisende hulp.
translations.uk: Я їду до відділення невідкладної допомоги.
translations.hi: मैं गाड़ी से इमरजेंसी में जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πάω στα επείγοντα με το αυτοκίνητο.
translations.id: Saya sedang mengemudi ke ruang gawat darurat.
translations.ja: 救急外来に車で向かっています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate expressing motion by vehicle.
Preposition contracted with article (‘zu der’ → ‘zur’); governs dative; indicates direction ‘to’ a place.
Common noun, feminine; here dative singular as object of the preposition ‘zur’.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder wartet in der Notaufnahme.

translations.de: Mein Bruder wartet in der Notaufnahme.
translations.en: My brother is waiting in the ER.
translations.es: Mi hermano está esperando en urgencias.
translations.it: Mio fratello sta aspettando al pronto soccorso.
translations.ru: Мой брат ждёт в отделении неотложной помощи.
translations.pt: Meu irmão está esperando no pronto-socorro.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi đang chờ ở phòng cấp cứu.
translations.nl: Mijn broer wacht op de spoedeisende hulp.
translations.uk: Мій брат чекає у відділенні невідкладної допомоги.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई इमरजेंसी में इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój brat czeka na ostrym dyżurze.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου περιμένει στα επείγοντα.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya sedang menunggu di ruang gawat darurat.
translations.ja: 兄が救急外来で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular); agrees with ‘Bruder’ (masc., nom. sg.).
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive predicate.
Two-way preposition; here with dative to indicate location (‘in’ = inside/at).
Definite article, feminine dative singular; accompanies ‘Notaufnahme’ after ‘in’ (location).
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘in’ (locative).

sentences.target: Die Ärztin ruft mich in die Notaufnahme.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈɛːʁt͡stɪn ʁuːft mɪç ɪn diː ˈnoːtʔaʊ̯fnaːmə/

translations.de: Die Ärztin ruft mich in die Notaufnahme.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈɛːʁt͡stɪn ʁuːft mɪç ɪn diː ˈnoːtʔaʊ̯fnaːmə/
translations.en: The doctor is calling me into the ER.
translations.es: La doctora me llama para entrar a urgencias.
translations.fr: La docteure m'appelle pour entrer aux urgences.
translations.it: La dottoressa mi chiama al pronto soccorso.
translations.ko: 여의사가 저를 응급실로 들어오라고 부르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 女医生叫我进去急诊室。
translations.yue: 女醫生叫我入去急症室。
translations.ru: Врач зовёт меня в отделение неотложной помощи.
translations.pt: A médica está me chamando para entrar no pronto-socorro.
translations.he: הרופאה קוראת לי להיכנס לחדר מיון.
translations.tr: Kadın doktor beni acil servise çağırıyor.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ nữ đang gọi tôi vào phòng cấp cứu.
translations.nl: De vrouwelijke arts roept me naar de spoedeisende hulp.
translations.uk: Лікарка кличе мене до відділення невідкладної допомоги.
translations.hu: A doktornő behív engem a sürgősségire.
translations.hi: महिला डॉक्टर मुझे इमरजेंसी के अंदर बुला रही है.
translations.pl: Lekarka woła mnie na ostry dyżur.
translations.el: Η γιατρός με καλεί να μπω στα επείγοντα.
translations.nb: Den kvinnelige legen kaller meg inn på akuttmottaket.
translations.id: Dokter perempuan memanggil saya masuk ke ruang gawat darurat.
translations.sv: Den kvinnliga läkaren kallar in mig til akuten.
translations.ro: Doctorița mă cheamă să intru la urgențe.
translations.da: Den kvindelige læge kalder mig ind på akutmodtagelsen.
translations.ja: 女医が私を救急外来に呼んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; modifies ‘Ärztin’ (subject).
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking ‘mich’ as direct object.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, accusative; direct object of ‘ruft’.
Two-way preposition; here with accusative to indicate motion into a place.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; accompanies ‘Notaufnahme’ after directional ‘in’.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as object of ‘in’ (direction).

sentences.target: Wir melden sie in der Notaufnahme an.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmɛldən ziː ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈnoːtʔaʊ̯fnaːmə an/

translations.de: Wir melden sie in der Notaufnahme an.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmɛldən ziː ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈnoːtʔaʊ̯fnaːmə an/
translations.en: We are checking her in at the ER.
translations.it: La stiamo registrando al pronto soccorso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为她在急诊室办理登记。
translations.yue: 我哋喺急症室幫佢辦理登記。
translations.ru: Мы оформляем её в отделении неотложной помощи.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang làm thủ tục cho cô ấy vào phòng cấp cứu.
translations.nl: We schrijven haar in bij de spoedeisende hulp.
translations.uk: Ми реєструємо її у відділенні невідкладної допомоги.
translations.hi: हम उसे इमरजेंसी में दर्ज कर रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi sjekker henne inn på akuttmottaket.
translations.id: Kami sedang mendaftarkan dia di ruang gawat darurat.
translations.ja: 救急外来で彼女の受付をしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; part of the separable verb ‘anmelden’ (‘melden … an’ = to register).
Personal pronoun, 3rd person, accusative; direct object of ‘melden’. Ambiguous between feminine singular and plural.
Two-way preposition; here with dative to indicate location (‘at/in’).
Definite article, feminine dative singular; accompanies ‘Notaufnahme’ after locative ‘in’.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘in’.
Separable verb particle; combines with ‘melden’ to form the verb ‘anmelden’ (‘to register’).

हम उसे इमरजेंसी में दर्ज कर रहे हैं.
